src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Removed inline comments explaining standard Spring Boot and Swing configuration steps to clean up the code.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.human_impl: Removed comments like '// Set Spring boot to headless false for Swing' and '// Start Spring Boot context with web server enabled'.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Added a new UIManager property to configure the title pane icon size globally.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.human_impl: Added UIManager.put("TitlePane.iconSize", new Dimension(24, 24)); in the configureSwingUI method.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Moved the TitlePane icon size configuration from the login page setup to the global UI configuration method.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.human_impl: Removed UIManager.put("TitlePane.iconSize", new Dimension(20, 20)); from showLoginPage and added it to configureSwingUI.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Changed the application logo resource path from a coffee shop icon to a Moe logo.
Increased the dimensions of the loaded application icon.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.human_impl: Changed icon creation parameters from 100, 100 to 512, 512.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.general_idea: Removed the unused lombok.Getter import to clean up the file.
Added a new GET endpoint to retrieve a user by their email address.
Added a new PUT endpoint to update the last login time for the current user.
Refactored the password reset endpoint to use query parameters instead of a request body DTO and changed the return type to Boolean.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.human_impl: @PutMapping("/reset_password") public ResponseEntity<Boolean> resetPassword(@RequestParam Map<String, Object> params) { ... }

src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.general_idea: Removed the static PasswordResetRequest DTO class as it is no longer used by the refactored endpoint.
Refactored the user registration endpoint to return a Boolean result indicating success instead of just a status code.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the lambda-based API introduced in Spring Security 5.7+.
Update authorization configuration to use the lambda-based API for request matching.
Update form login configuration to use the lambda-based API.
Update logout configuration to use the lambda-based API.
Add a custom success handler to return HTTP 200 on successful login.
Add a custom failure handler to return HTTP 401 on failed login attempts.
Enable HTTP Basic authentication with default settings.
Update permitted API endpoints to reflect the new music player domain structure.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Removed the unused javax.swing import to clean up the file.
Replaced the existing color palette with a new 'MuseMoe' themed palette featuring dark backgrounds and cherry blossom accents.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.human_impl: public static final Color BACKGROUND_COLOR = Color.decode("#1A1A1A");

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Removed the entire set of dark theme color constants, likely consolidating to a single dark-themed design.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.human_impl: -    public static final Color DARK_BACKGROUND_COLOR = Color.decode("#333333");

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Removed color constants and icon paths specific to the reservation page feature.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.human_impl: -    public static final Color RESERVED_TABLE_COLOR = Color.decode("#FFD700");

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Removed color constants associated with order statuses (pending, completed, delivery).
src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.human_impl: -    public static final Color PENDING_ORDER = Color.decode("#FFE4B5");

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Replaced the previous role hierarchy (Manager, Staff, etc.) with a new set of roles (Admin, Free, Premium, Artist).

src/main/java/com/javaweb/controlleradvi.general_idea: Add a global exception handler for RuntimeException to return a structured 404 JSON response.
Add a global exception handler for generic Exception to return a structured 500 JSON response.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Enti.general_idea: The toDTO method signature is updated to declare checked exceptions related to MP3 file processing.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Enti.human_impl: D toDTO(E entity) throws InvalidDataException, UnsupportedTagException, IOException;

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Enti.general_idea: Imports for mp3agic library exceptions and IOException are added to support the new method signature.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Role.general_idea: Rename the entity class from Role to RoleEntity to follow a more explicit naming convention.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Role.human_impl: import com.javaweb.entity.RoleEntity; ... implements EntityConverter<RoleEntity, ...> ... toDTO(RoleEntity roleEntity)

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/User.general_idea: Rename User entity class to UserEntity to align with new naming conventions.
Rename Role entity class to RoleEntity to align with new naming conventions.
Rename Media entity class to MediaEntity to align with new naming conventions.
Remove dependency on RoleConverter as role conversion logic is now handled inline.
Simplify role DTO mapping to return a set of role codes prefixed with 'ROLE_' instead of full RoleDTO objects.
Remove mapping of visibleRoles field from UserDTO as it is no longer required.
Simplify avatar handling by setting it to null if not provided, removing default constant usage.
Refactor role assignment logic to set default FREE role only if no roles are provided in the request.
Set default preferred language to 'en' for new users.
Consolidate individual java.util imports into a wildcard import for cleaner code.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/BaseEnt.general_idea: Consolidated multiple explicit javax.persistence imports into a single wildcard import.
Added import for java.time.LocalDateTime to support new timestamp fields.
Uncommented and enabled audit fields (created_at, updated_at) and their lifecycle callbacks.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/enums/RoleType.general_idea: Removed the import for BaseEnum which is no longer used in the file.
